source: HDX dataset from Microsoft AI for Good Lab; external model-predicted building damage footprints, not official Copernicus EMS damage labels.
dataset_title: Venezuela Earthquakes: Building Damage Assessment in East Catia La Mar
filter: Published only if damaged == 1 or max(damage_pct_0m, damage_pct_10m, damage_pct_20m) >= 0.50.
map_payload: damage.geojson is a compact browser map payload with point geometry, centroid coordinates, and trimmed properties; use CSV or the HDX source GPKG for full footprint/attribute review.
warning: External model prediction for triage only. Not official Copernicus EMS damage. Do not use for official counts without field or official validation.
